title: ResolveResult
description: Output of resolve_wallet (4-tier fallback). Drives bot UX: avatar, handle, verification badge, fallback messaging. Per [[chat-medium-presentation-boundary]]: substrate IDs (raw addresses, UUIDs) MUST NOT escape via this shape's display fields. Sources: mibera-dimensions/lib/server/resolve-wallet.ts:56-331.

found.description: True if any tier produced a result. False = anon-fallback (per [[primary-wallet-doctrine]] graceful).

handle.description: Display handle for chat-medium presentation. Falls back to wallet-shortened (0x79…34) when handle absent.

pfp_url.description: Profile picture URL. Resolved via tier ladder (custom · grail-bound · derived · default).

fallback.description: True when result came from a fallback tier (not primary lookup). Bot may surface 'fallback identity' badge.

resolved_via.description: Which tier produced the result. Tier ladder: primary (wallet-direct) > discord (Discord-binding) > handle (handle-search) > wallet-fallback (wallet-shortened) > anon (no result).
